Overrides.Override: Buffs on you expire 30% slower Debuffs on you expire 30% faster Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Warp

Rarity: UNIQUE Replica Farrul's Fur Triumphant Lamellar Armour: 1148 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.5058 Evasion: 1443 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.5123 Unique ID: 3395db9184dd02a3878b07d0e21b284df874977609c312088f0d2c920dc045d7 Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-R-G-R-G-G LevelReq: 69 Implicits: 2 +2 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems +2 to Level of Socketed Trap or Mine Gems 134% increased Armour and Evasion +95 to maximum Life +2.00 seconds to Cat's Agility Duration Aspect of the Cat has no Reservation Gain up to your maximum number of Frenzy and Endurance Charges when you gain Cat's Agility You have Onslaught while you have Cat's Agility Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Ralakesh's Impatience Riveted Boots Armour: 83 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.7913 Energy Shield: 18 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: 687b72637b5aded7cee77958c52dd5620071420f9219d273f635da8f33c66417 Item Level: 86 Quality: 19 Sockets: G-R-R-R LevelReq: 36 Implicits: 1 6% increased maximum Life +15% to Cold Resistance +21% to Chaos Resistance 24% increased Movement Speed Corrupted Blood cannot be inflicted on you Count as having maximum number of Frenzy Charges Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Usurper's Penance Eternal Burgonet Armour: 927 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: 677f57d75158f9133c5181f42de1b7cb886f52883fe0a75fbf931ba5c3484c64 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-B-B LevelReq: 69 Implicits: 2 +2 to Level of Socketed Curse Gems Socketed Skill Gems get a 90% Cost & Reservation Multiplier 80% increased Armour Attacks have 15% chance to cause Bleeding 50% reduced Light Radius +4% to Damage over Time Multiplier for Bleeding per Frenzy Charge Bleeding you inflict deals Damage 4% faster per Frenzy Charge 30% chance to gain a Frenzy Charge on Critical Strike at Close Range Corrupted

Input.name: customMods
Input.string:
Merc Stats:
/Pride Aura/ Nearby Enemies take 90% more physical damage /Temp Curse/ 30% more Bleed Duration /Rallying Cry/ Adds 398 to 659 physical damage to Attacks
